trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 56.7 in the sweet bullish momentum zone (not overbought), confirmed MACD crossover and rising histogram — cleanest technical setup on the board at a low per-share price.

Score 95 with RSI 55.4 in the bullish zone, MACD crossover with rising histogram, and price holding above SMA-20 — strong AI/data-platform tailwinds make this the highest-quality name among top-ranked candidates.

decisions.briefing: Markets posted a quietly positive neutral session (NASDAQ +0.7%, S&P +0.3%) with most top candidates heavily overbought (RSI 80–95), making selective entry risky. SNAP and PLTR stand out as the only score-95 names with RSI still in the healthy 55–70 zone, so I'm deploying the remaining cash into those two while leaving the rest of the portfolio untouched — PTON continues running nicely toward its +12% target.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on May 7 with tech leading as the NASDAQ gained 0.7% and the S&P 500 added 0.3%. The advance was broad but thin in participation, as many high-momentum names showed extreme RSI readings above 80, suggesting speculative rotation rather than broad fundamental buying. Investors appeared to be selectively picking up laggard momentum plays while staying cautious ahead of upcoming macro data.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於5月7日小幅走高，科技股領漲，那斯達克上漲0.7%，標普500指數上揚0.3%。整體漲勢雖廣泛，但參與度偏薄，多隻高動能股票RSI已超過80，反映市場以投機性輪動為主，而非基本面驅動的全面買盤。投資者傾向於佈局動能相對滯後、尚未過熱的個股，同時對即將公布的宏觀數據保持謹慎。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures how fast a stock has risen recently on a 0–100 scale. When RSI climbs above 70, a stock is considered 'overbought' — it has moved up so quickly that a pullback becomes more likely. Today's screener showed a flood of stocks with RSI between 80–95 (HIMX, LIFE, XMTR, etc.), which is why we avoided them in favor of SNAP and PLTR whose RSI sits in the healthier 55–70 momentum zone.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: RSI（相對強弱指數）以0至100的刻度衡量股票近期上漲的速度。當RSI升破70，代表股票已進入「超買」狀態，即短期內漲幅過快，回調風險上升。今日選股池中，HIMX、LIFE、XMTR等多隻股票RSI介於80至95之間，因此我們選擇迴避，轉而買入RSI仍處於健康動能區間（55至70）的SNAP與PLTR，以控制追高風險。
